metadata.title: Vault Transfer
metadata.description: Copies a note, and pastes it into another vault.

regex.source: Notice(`Error: Directory does not exist at ${outputFolderPath}`)
name: "Transfer current note to other vault: From list"
regex.target: name: "将当前笔记转移到其他保管库：从列表"

regex.source: name: "Transfer current note to other vault: From settings"
regex.target: name: "将当前注释传输到其他vault：从设置"

regex.source: name: "Insert link to current note in other vault"
regex.target: name: "在其他vault中插入指向当前注释的链接"

regex.source: text: "Please enter the name of the folder you want to create"
regex.target: text: "请输入要创建的文件夹名称"

regex.source: .setDesc("The full file path to the other vault root folder.")
regex.target: .setDesc("其他vault根文件夹的完整文件路径。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The full file path to the directory containing all vaults.")
regex.target: .setDesc("包含所有Vault目录的完整文件路径。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If set to true, the folder structure of the original file will be recreated in the new vault.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果设置为true，则将在新vault中重新创建原始文件的文件夹结构。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Removes the specified folders from the output path, if present. Separate folders by using a comma or a new line. Names are case insensitive.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从输出路径中删除指定的文件夹（如果存在），使用逗号或新行分隔文件夹，名称不区分大小写。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If set to true, the original file will be deleted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果设置为true，则将删除原始文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If set to true, the original file will be moved to the system trash. Otherwise, it will be moved to the vault trash.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果设置为true，原始文件将被移动到系统回收站。否则，它将被移至保险库垃圾箱。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a link to the new file in the new vault to the current note. If set to false, the file will be left unchanged.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将指向新vault中新文件的链接添加到当前注释中。如果设置为false，则文件将保持不变。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If set to false, the file will be skipped if it already exists in the other vault.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置为false，则如果文件已存在于其他vault中，将跳过该文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The folder will use the output vault as root")
regex.target: .setDesc("该文件夹将使用输出vault作为根目录")
